name: Verdant Colossus
description: A jungle world swallowing the ruins of a stone-and-sorcery empire. Mile-high ziggurats and canopy rail-lines rot under vine and moss while only the tallest spires still catch the sun. The construction golems that toppled the empire still walk their old patrol routes, purging anything with a pulse.
mood: Beautiful, green, and utterly indifferent to you. The land is a paradise; the machines still tending it will kill you on sight.
biome: jungle-choked stone ruins under a high canopy

enemies.name: Mason Drone
enemies.role: cheap swarm melee that dies fast but comes in numbers
enemies.description: A cat-sized stone drone that scuttles on four clawed legs.

enemies.name: Chisel Drone
enemies.role: fast melee that closes distance and shreds armor
enemies.description: A darting drone with a single chisel-tipped foreleg.

enemies.name: Rivet Drone
enemies.role: support that repairs damaged constructs each turn
enemies.description: A hovering drone with a rivet-gun arm for patching allies.

enemies.name: Grout Drone
enemies.role: builder that raises stone cover to block lanes
enemies.description: A squat drone that oozes fresh stone from a nozzle.

enemies.name: Mason Golem
enemies.description: A blocky worker golem of stacked, mortared stone.

enemies.name: Stone Sentinel
enemies.role: high-HP tank that soaks hits and holds the line
enemies.description: A tall guard golem carved with faded patrol-markings.

enemies.name: Sling Golem
enemies.role: ranged attacker that hurls masonry from a distance
enemies.description: A hunched golem that pries loose chunks of wall to throw.

enemies.name: Shield Golem
enemies.role: blocker that guards adjacent constructs from harm
enemies.description: A wide golem with a stone slab bolted to one arm.

enemies.name: Lift Golem
enemies.role: control unit that flings and repositions the party with gravity
enemies.description: A heavy golem with a glowing gravity-well set in its chest.

enemies.name: Siege Golem
enemies.description: A half-buried automaton of rusted plates and clinging moss.

enemies.name: Mortar Golem
enemies.description: A squat golem with a stone barrel jutting from its back.

enemies.name: Foreman Golem
enemies.role: commander that buffs constructs and summons more drones
enemies.description: A lean golem whose horn-blares still command the drones.

enemies.name: Stone Colossus
enemies.role: boss bruiser with massive HP and crushing melee
enemies.description: A weathered giant of fitted stone, taller than the canopy.

enemies.name: Lift Colossus
enemies.role: boss that hurls the whole party around with gravity
enemies.description: A towering golem cored with a blazing gravity-well.

enemies.name: Siege Colossus
enemies.role: boss that charges in melee and bombards from range
enemies.description: A fully unearthed siege automaton draped in torn vines.

enemies.name: Foreman Colossus
enemies.role: boss that endlessly revives and rallies drones
enemies.description: A giant overseer that blares orders across the ruins.

items.name: Chisel Blade
items.description: A mason's chisel ground down to a sword's edge.

items.name: Machete
items.description: A broad jungle blade for hacking through vine and foe.

items.name: Sentinel Blade
items.description: A long blade pried from a fallen stone sentinel.

items.name: Rail Saber
items.description: A saber forged from a length of humming stone rail.

items.name: Rail Spike
items.description: A stone rail-spike lashed to a wooden haft.

items.name: Mason's Pick
items.description: A heavy stonework pick that punches through armor.

items.name: Siege Pike
items.description: A long pike torn from the arm of a siege golem.

items.name: Ironwood Bow
items.description: A sturdy bow cut from dense jungle ironwood.

items.name: Recurve Bow
items.description: A curved bow that drives arrows with extra force.

items.name: Longbow
items.description: A tall bow with long reach and a heavy draw.

items.name: Stone Staff
items.description: A carved stone rod that channels simple sorcery.

items.name: Gravity Staff
items.description: A rod that taps the old lift-wells to fling foes.

items.name: Sorcerer's Staff
items.description: A Grovemason focus humming with stored sorcery.

items.name: Stone Maul
items.description: A heavy mason's maul for breaking rock and bone.

items.name: Sledgehammer
items.description: A two-handed hammer that flattens what it hits.

items.name: Siege Hammer
items.description: A maul-head salvaged from a wrecked siege automaton.
